note: Frozen after Step 3. QC retries reuse this package verbatim. Zero external case studies were fabricated; the respondent's own material was rich enough to carry a tight episode, which the no-fabrication rule (Tier 1 check 12) requires over inventing sources.
webResearchTool: Perplexity (wired for this client); the tool is named in the delivery report per Part A.
improvedAnswersSummary: Each respondent answer was expanded for specificity and cadence without changing intent: the winter, the erosion of accounts, the numb wheel, and the afternoon with Ruth.
powerStatements: The work of your hands is not the thing worth saving; the room is, the people in it are, you are.
The hiding is not protecting you; the hiding is the whole illness.
A single thread of feeling, when you have been empty long enough, is how the tide begins to come back in.
generatedTakeaways: Trying to save the business and remembering why it is worth saving are different tasks, easily reversed.
A weight shared across a room is a different weight than the same load carried alone.
Being seen by one steady person is the beginning of the cure.
closingCallToAction: Let one earned person sit on the stool and watch you make one small thing.
fabricationCheck: No invented study, statistic, person, company, institution, or biography anywhere in the package.
